result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 9:     AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                              ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred AS (
  SELECT bc.*
  FROM base_cases bc
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = bc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
), handle_time AS (
  SELECT
    owner_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT owner_id, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds, COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM handle_time
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT owner_id
FROM avg_handle
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred AS (
  SELECT bc.*
  FROM base_cases bc
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = bc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
), handle_time AS (
  SELECT
    owner_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT owner_id, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds, COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM handle_time
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT owner_id
FROM avg_handle
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN base_cases bc ON bc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred AS (
  SELECT bc.*
  FROM base_cases bc
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = bc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
), handle_time AS (
  SELECT
    owner_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT owner_id, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds, COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM handle_time
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT owner_id
FROM avg_handle
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
